title: Blockade the Passer
subtitle: Stop the passed pawn with a knight
summary: The engine has a dangerous passed pawn on d4. Park your knight in front of it, then round it up.

body.goal: Find the square that blockades the passed pawn, then win it against the engine.
body.successHint: A passed pawn is stopped by sitting a piece on the square directly in front of it.
body.explain: Right. Nd3 sits squarely in front of the pawn. A blockaded passer can never advance, and now you'll win it at your leisure.
body.wrong: That doesn't stop the pawn. A passer is halted by occupying the square right in front of it, not by chasing it.

misplays.explain: Nd5 wanders the wrong way and leaves d3 free: ...d3 and the pawn is running. Blockade it with Nd3.
Attacking the pawn with Ne2 lets it advance with tempo — ...d3 kicks your knight. Blockade it first with Nd3.
